subject: [POLICY] Change API and PAP usernames
commit_message:
[POLICY] Change API and PAP usernames

- change references of healthcheck to policyadmin regarding API and PAP auth
- add robot variables to accommodate the referred changes.

Issue-ID: POLICY-3815
Change-Id: I318b7f44d9e7f554d98d845abd80cc6512831b78
Signed-off-by: adheli.tavares <adheli.tavares@est.tech>

Please correct me if I'm wrong but don't we need to change those in robot and in policy in the same time to keep the HC always working?
If that's the case please squash those two into a single commit

>

Hi Krzysztof, the commits were split because they went into a circle dependency with the testsuite changes. So first we introduce the variables, then change them along with this commit https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/testsuite/+/125918
Let me know if it makes sense for you.

Patch Set 5:

I believe the testsuites changes have to be merged first before this one.   There are 401s in the healthchecks for policy that I don't think will clear until that review is merged.

Patch Set 5: Code-Review-1

The errors below should be tackled first to avoid future problems with new policy submissions.   The robot test suite changes should get merged first.    I suggest not to merge until we get a clean run here.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Basic Policy Health Check                                             | FAIL |
401 != 200
------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Enhanced Policy New Healthcheck                                       | FAIL |
401 != 200
------------------------------------------------------------------------------
